No response to Examiner's Notes sent 9/18/19 (other than a submitted proposed order that is called a "judgment," is single spaced, not on proper pleading paper, and has cut off text). If an amendment to the petition is not filed in sufficient time to give notice of the amendment prior to the 12/2/19 hearing, the hearing will have to be continued again unless notice is waived. If the amendment is filed timely, an endorsed filed copy of the amendment and the proof of service of notice of the amendment must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/25/19.
